title: Selling Software Without a Stripe Account: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

You've been told that PayPal and Stripe are your best bets, but you're blocked from using them. The reason? Your country is on a list of restricted nations, and you're not allowed to access their services. You've tried to find workarounds, but they're either too expensive or too complicated. You need a solution that works for you, not against you. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, with Web3 Wallet Connect - a straightforward, no-nonsense way to sell your software without the hassle of Stripe.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are the usual suspects when it comes to online payment processing. But what do they actually offer? PayPal is a behemoth of a company that's been around for decades, but it's also notorious for freezing accounts and withholding funds. Stripe is a more modern option, but it still requires a bank account and a lot of paperwork. Gumroad and Payhip are smaller players, but they're not much better when it comes to restricted countries. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is a plug-and-play solution that lets you sell software without needing a Stripe account. It's a more straightforward and more cost-effective option that's tailored to your needs as a digital creator in Nigeria.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have their own rules when it comes to restricted countries. PayPal, for example, blocks entire countries from using their services, while Stripe requires a lot of paperwork and often freezes accounts. Gumroad and Payhip are no better, with their own set of restrictions and hoops to jump through. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect doesn't care about your country's restrictions. It's designed to work with 300+ coins and doesn't require any KYC or buyer account setup. That means you can sell software to anyone, anywhere, without having to worry about getting blocked or frozen out.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed, fees, and real costs are some of the most important considerations when it comes to online payment processing. PayPal, for example, charges high fees and takes a long time to process payments. Stripe is a bit better, but it still charges a lot of fees and requires a bank account. Gumroad and Payhip are no better, with their own set of fees and processing times. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is designed to be fast, cheap, and hassle-free. It charges low fees and processes payments instantly, so you can get paid quickly and easily.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are also crucial when it comes to online payment processing. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have their own automation tools and delivery systems, but they're often clunky and difficult to use. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is designed to automate everything for you. It automatically delivers software, verifies payments, and sends PDF receipts, so you can focus on creating more software and selling it to your customers. It's a game-changer for digital creators like you who want to sell software without the hassle of Stripe.
